goal: Skills audit — classify every skill in the catalog as (real skill / CLI wrapper / stale / duplicate) and collapse. Catalog size today: 92 canonical skills in vendor/get-anything-done/skills/ plus 283 paths across .claude/skills, .cursor/skills, .codex/skills, .agents/skills runtime mirrors. Operator 2026-04-22: 'I am guessing we havent done our skills audit, removing duplicates and reducing our runtime folders to just bare minimum.' For each canonical SKILL.md classify: (a) REAL SKILL — structured multi-step workflow with allowed-tools, artifact contracts, subagent spawning, hook-relevant boundaries. Keep. (b) CLI WRAPPER — skill that only runs a gad subcommand and returns; no decisions, no substeps. Collapse into CLI or delete. (c) STALE — references deleted phases, replaced workflows, deprecated commands. Delete. (d) DUPLICATE — overlaps with another skill 80%+. Merge. Output: .planning/notes/2026-04-22-skills-audit.md with per-skill verdict + action + migration plan. Expect ~30-40% reduction. Feeds 63-28 (plugin content) and 63-30 (MCP tool server).
